candidates.name: Amped Fitness – Carrollwood (Tampa)
candidates.address: 14350 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
candidates.price_note: Memberships from $14.99/mo; free 3-day guest pass offered via ampedfitness.com/free-pass
candidates.description: 22,300 sq ft 24/7 big-box gym that opened on N Dale Mabry in December 2023 — the Tampa outpost of the fast-growing Amped Fitness chain (this is the 'Amp'd' of local rumor). Its signature Babe Cave is a dedicated women's-only training room behind its own door, described by Amped as 'One-of-a-kind, women-only, and made to unleash confidence.' The rest of the floor stacks a Recovery Zone with HydroMassage beds, dry sauna, tanning, Kids Club childcare, basketball and instructor-led classes.

amenities.detail: Babe Cave — women's-only workout room with its own upper/lower-body equipment, accessible 24/7 behind a closed door
Instructor-led classes plus unlimited virtual group classes

equipment.detail: Smith machines inside the Babe Cave women's-only room
Free weights, including dedicated selection in the Babe Cave

candidates.name: Peach Lab
candidates.price_note: Intro offer: 3 classes for $30 (single classes normally $30); drop-ins, 10-class packs, 1x/2x-per-week and unlimited memberships plus personal training available
candidates.description: Women's glute-training studio on Kennedy Blvd — Tampa's closest thing to a Glute Lab — running 150+ coach-led classes a month like Oh My Glutes!, Plump!, Lean Peach and Arm Candy. The studio bills itself as 'where women come to build strength, confidence, and community through expert glute training in a premium space,' pairing its Peach Lab Method with high-energy playlists and form-first coaching.

amenities.detail: Self-described 'Women's Glute Studio' — space and programming built exclusively for women
150+ classes/month: glute-focused strength, cardio and full-body formats

candidates.name: Fox Fitness
candidates.price_note: 14-day free trial pass; '4 Weeks for $49' intro offer. Note: site footer/contact page still shows a prior address (3311 S Dale Mabry Hwy 33629); homepage lists 4002 S Coolidge Ave
candidates.description: All-women boutique training community in South Tampa offering small-group classes, strength, mobility and private training. Fox describes itself as an 'All Women Fitness Community Boutique gym' with coaching geared toward helping women over 40 reverse the effects of aging, under a 'Strong Women Lift Each Other Up' ethos.

amenities.detail: 'All Women Fitness Community Boutique gym' per Fox Fitness's own site
Small-group strength and mobility classes with per-member modifications
